ocr_findings.description: Ruby (furigana) phonetic readings shown above some terms in the image (e.g. over 'ブレードサーバ', 'DNSサーバ') are not captured in OCR; expected limitation of Mistral OCR for inline ruby text.

reviewer_notes: Page contains two exam questions (11-12 and 11-13) with four-choice ア/イ/ウ/エ options, plus answer key line and answers/explanations for 11-1 through 11-4. All question stems, choice text, answer keys, and explanation body captured accurately. Minor ruby text omission is cosmetic and expected.
